text.title: LLM Observability Stack — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `llm-observability-stack`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: deploy-otel
step.action: Deploy OTel collector with attribute-processor for PII redaction.

step.name: deploy-langfuse
step.action: Deploy Langfuse with langfuse-stack.yaml; configure OTel-ingest.

step.name: deploy-prom
step.action: Wire Prometheus to scrape collector + langfuse metrics endpoint.

step.name: wire-instrumentation
step.action: Add openllmetry / openinference / langfuse_handler per provider.

step.name: wire-pricing
step.action: Computes cost_usd per call; promql metric.

step.name: wire-alerts
step.action: alert-rules.yaml with page + warn tiers; route to PagerDuty / on-call.
